title: Better_Vanilla MC
description: A vanilla-friendly resource pack with enhanced textures, visual tweaks, and improved gameplay experience.
body:
##  What is the changes in this resourcepack?

### 1. Better crosshair & armor bar.

### 2. Added better dark UI.

### 3. Better tools with trims.

### 4. Animated ores and ingots

### 5. Better bow and crossbow.

### 6. Animated golden foods.

### 7. Animated ender eye & pearl.

### 8. Animated totem.

### 9. Better smooth end crystal.

### 10. Better respawn anchor.

### 11. Better shield.

### 12. Better new spears.

### 13. Better tooltip frame.

### 14. Better fishing rods.

### 15. Animated blaze & breeze rod.

### 16. Animated firework rocket.

### 17. Animated spectral arrow.

### 18. Animated redstone stuff.

## More about this pack-

**Better_Vanilla MC** is a under editing resourcepack. It is not fully completed for **Minecraft**. This pack will make your tools, ores, ingots, crosshair and armor bar more better than vanilla minecraft look. So, we are trying to make more things better. It needs a little bit more time. So, Please keep support me everyone.

## How to use it:

To download the pack, first click on the download arrow and select your game version. Now click for installation or downloading. After download, go to your download folder or section. Now select the pack and copy and paste it in your .minecraft folder resourcepack section. Then open your game and select your **Better_Vanilla MC** pack and enjoy!
